phoneticUs: 藢str忙t蓹藞sf瑟r瑟k; 藢str忙t蓹藞sfer瑟k
examples: 'Geo-engineering plans to inject stratospheric aerosols or to seed clouds would act to cool the planet, and act to increase the extent of sea ice,' says Rasch.
Every austral spring, an ominous "hole" appears in stratospheric ozone over Antarctica.
Barack Obama's inauguration was marked by global jubilation and stratospheric expectations.
Such views and rhetoric are certainly not originating at the stratospheric level of the broadcast press.
Every computer model of a stratospheric haze shows some decrease in rainfall, though the details vary.
